summary: ANDROID | Log In - When user is Logged out button does not work but user is Logged out
scenario: Tapping Log Out button does not update UI to show Log In button, but user is logged out successfully.
description_clean: When a user taps the Log Out button, the button does not respond visually (no action observed), but the user is actually logged out. Upon re-entering the Account tab, the user is logged out correctly. The issue appears to be a UI-only bug where the Log Out button remains displayed instead of switching to the Log In button after logout.
steps: 1. Open the app and navigate to the Account tab.
3. Observe the visual response of the button after tapping.
4. Check if the user is logged out by navigating away and returning to the Account tab.
expected: After tapping Log Out, the button should visually respond (e.g., loading state, disabled) and immediately switch to a Log In button. The user should be logged out.
actual: The Log Out button does not respond visually (no action observed), but the user is actually logged out. Upon re-entering the Account tab, the user is logged out correctly, but the Log Out button remains displayed instead of switching to the Log In button.
